name: gh-pr-tracker
title: GitHub Pull Requests
description: Track unread pull request activity across your GitHub or GitHub Enterprise repositories from a single Raycast command.
author: oslen

commands.name: unread-menu-bar
commands.title: Unread PR Alert
commands.subtitle: GitHub Pull Requests
commands.description: Menu bar alert showing how many pull requests have unread changes

preferences.name: token
preferences.title: Personal Access Token
preferences.description: A PAT with repo read access

preferences.name: repos
preferences.title: Repositories
preferences.description: Comma-separated list of repositories in owner/repo format
